rationale: Plasma physics and optics are genuinely different specific fields, so field_match fails. The stated Vlasov-type kinetic transport of a Wigner phase-space quasi-distribution with collisionless Landau damping from resonant phase mixing suppressing a wave instability denotes the same specific machinery as the reference's Landau-type stabilization of a modulational instability set by the spread of the background field's statistical spectral distribution (the Wigner/Vlasov kinetic treatment of partially coherent waves), so mechanism_match holds; overall_equivalent is their conjunction and is false.
